description: Synthetic-company demo mapping fixture. Maps source-native principals (stored on chunks) to the Entra principals callers actually hold. Loaded via PRINCIPAL_MAPPINGS_FILE=demo/acme-corp/principal-mappings.json. NOTE: confluence-group:board-confidential is DELIBERATELY ABSENT — an unmapped source group is invisible to everyone (fail-closed). And confluence-group:security IS mapped here, yet seed/.../security-incident.md is quarantined (acl_status: failed), so even an entra-group:security caller sees nothing — quarantine overrides a valid mapping.

mappings.note: Finance may read the Q3 budget / Project Northwind
Engineering may read the platform deployment/rollback runbook
Mapping EXISTS — but the security-incident doc is quarantined (acl_status: failed), so even this mapped caller sees nothing until resolution succeeds
